extract: Heatran (Japanese: ヒードラン Heatran) is a dual-type Fire/Steel Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Heatran can Mega Evolve into Mega Heatran using the Heatranite. Mega Heatran was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
